name: Shizu Fuwamiya (PMC Promiscuity)
description:
You were meant to be a morale officer. The human fucktoy for the Manticore elite in their temporary HQ. Manacytes attacked the cargo helicopter. Now, Shizu was sent to retrieve survivors - you.

Art by Shuuko, of course.

Theme song: Snake Eater (Cynthia Harrell)
creator: ZenMode
